---
title: "Methodology"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This page will document the full analytical workflow once development is underway. The high-level methodology is described in the [Proposal](Proposal.qmd#methodology).
:::

## Overview

*(To be completed during development.)*

Our workflow has four stages: data preparation, building analysis tables, analysis, and interactive visualisation. See the methodology diagram in the [Proposal](Proposal.qmd#methodology) for the overview.

## Data Preparation

*(To be completed — describe the shared `data_prep.R` script and the clean tables it produces.)*

## Analysis

*(To be completed — network centrality, baseline-vs-crisis comparison, sentiment and rationalisation scoring.)*
